Event: Magic Training - Thunderdog
Event Date: 18/10/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: A156
Flash of Devotion

Triggers: Once in a while

Electric Cage
Puts the enemy with the highest spell power into an electric orb for 5 sec. During this time, the target can't restore health or use any abilities (except those granted by the set equipped). Also, all enemies in a small radius from the main target are electrified for 5 sec. Whenever the electrified unit uses an ability, they will be stunned for 1 sec, and they and the unit in the electric orb take 160000 magic damage.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
